subject: UPS Bypass Rating
question: Drawing E-205 shows 800A bypass. Spec Section 16480 requires 1000A. Which takes precedence?
resolution: Spec Section 16480 takes precedence. Vendor to resubmit with 1000A bypass rating. DR-001 raised.

subject: Earthing Conductor Cross-Section
question: Spec requires 50x6mm copper earthing strip but vendor has submitted 40x5mm. Is this acceptable?
resolution: Not acceptable. 50x6mm is minimum per IS 3043. Vendor must comply. NCR-007 logged.

subject: Cooling Tower Clearance
question: Drawing M-110 shows 1.2m clearance between cooling towers. ASHRAE recommends 1.5m. Confirm?
resolution: Revise layout to 1.5m minimum clearance per ASHRAE 90.1. M-110 Rev B issued.

subject: Cable Tray Loading
question: What is the maximum permissible cable load per metre for 300mm wide GI cable tray?
resolution: Per IEC 61537: 300mm GI tray (1.5mm thickness) rated at 45kg/m. Confirmed with manufacturer.

subject: Generator Auto-Start Delay
question: Spec states mains failure to generator start within 10 seconds. Vendor confirms 15s. Acceptable?
resolution: 10 seconds is contractual requirement per Uptime Institute Tier III. Vendor must modify controller.

subject: UPS Battery Room Ventilation
question: VRLA batteries proposed. Spec requires forced ventilation. Is natural ventilation acceptable for VRLA?
resolution: Natural ventilation acceptable for VRLA per IEEE 1187 if room volume exceeds 30m3. Confirmed.

subject: Fire Suppression Discharge Time
question: FM-200 system design shows 10-second discharge. TIA-942 requires less than 10 seconds. Confirm.
resolution: Discharge must be ≤10 seconds per TIA-942-B Section 5.9. Redesign required — new calc submitted.

subject: Raised Floor Load Rating
question: Drawing A-301 specifies 12kN/m2 raised floor. Server racks may exceed this. Confirm adequacy.
resolution: 12kN/m2 (1200 kg/m2) exceeds maximum rack density of 1000 kg/m2. Current spec is adequate.

subject: Fibre Optic Cable Route
question: Preferred cable route conflicts with structural beam at grid E-7. Alternate route via C-7 feasible?
resolution: Route via C-7 approved. Drawing N-115 Rev C issued. No impact to critical path.

subject: BMS Protocol Compatibility
question: BMS controller supports BACnet/IP. DCIM vendor requires Modbus TCP. Interface gateway required?
resolution: Provide BACnet/IP to Modbus TCP gateway — Anybus X-Gateway approved. Add to BOM.

subject: Containment System Material
question: Drawing M-205 shows aluminium containment. Spec says steel. Cost saving possible with aluminium?
resolution: Steel containment required per fire rating requirements (FR-30). Aluminium not acceptable.

subject: Generator Fuel Tank Capacity
question: Spec requires 24h fuel autonomy at full load. Vendor tank is sized for 20h. Acceptable?
resolution: 24h autonomy is minimum per Tier III requirements. Vendor must upsize tank. NCR-012 raised.

subject: VESDA Detector Spacing
question: VESDA capillary tube spacing shown as 6m on drawing. AS 1603.6 recommends 5m. Confirm.
resolution: Spacing must comply with AS 1603.6 maximum 5m. Drawing S-401 revised to 5m spacing.

subject: PDU Input Plug Type
question: PDUs specified with IEC 309 3P+N+E 32A inlet. Busduct tap-offs are 63A. Adapter required?
resolution: Provide 63A to 32A step-down pigtail adapter per IEC 60309. Add to electrical BOM.

subject: Seismic Bracing for Racks
question: Project site is in Zone II seismic area. Are server racks required to be seismically braced?
resolution: Seismic bracing required per IS 1893 Zone II. Vendor to supply floor-anchoring kit for all racks.

subject: Emergency Power Off Button Location
question: EPO button location not shown on drawings. Code requires at main entrance. Confirm location.
resolution: EPO buttons to be located at each data hall entrance and at the main electrical room per NFPA 75.

subject: Hot Aisle Containment Door Width
question: Containment end doors shown as 800mm wide. Racks are 800mm deep. Clearance issue — confirm.
resolution: End doors must be minimum 900mm wide to accommodate rack depth plus cable management.

subject: Grounding of Cable Trays
question: Drawing E-310 does not show cable tray grounding lugs. Are grounding continuity bonds required?
resolution: Continuous grounding required per NEC 392.60. Add grounding lugs at every 15m tray section.

subject: CRAC Unit Condensate Drainage
question: Drawing M-115 shows condensate drain to nearest floor drain. Spec requires dedicated drain. Confirm.
resolution: Dedicated condensate drain line required per spec. Drawing M-115 Rev D issued with dedicated route.

subject: UPS System Parallel Redundancy
question: Two UPS units specified in parallel. Confirm N+1 or 2N configuration required per Tier III?
resolution: Tier III requires N+1 minimum. 2N configuration provided exceeds requirement — confirmed acceptable.
